task_completion.visual_evidence: The MedinTux application is open and logged in, typically showing the practitioner's name (e.g., Dr TUX) in the interface.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient record or registration form in MedinTux showing Name: MOREAU Pierre, DOB: 1975-04-12 (or 12/04/1975), and Sex: M.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the MedinTux GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the MedinTux graphical user interface being used to enter data, rather than a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details are entered into the actual input fields of the MedinTux application, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use SQL commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands into the MedinTux database.
